title: Multi-target Runtime Compilation Layer — target manifest and Ordo-code AI-facing view

included: embedded runtime CLI allowlist for render-runtime-view and verify-targets
excluded: session.ordo.trace append-only proof program (planned for M60.2)

core_rule: JSON IR decides. Ordo-code explains. Session-trace proves.
risk_notes: ordo-code-view is not a second source of truth; it is derived from json-ir and verified through targets.manifest.json.
AI-facing target files remain under compiled/* and must not be read directly in Runtime Mode; CLI output remains the legal access path.
session-trace was intentionally deferred to M60.2 to avoid mixing target projection and execution proof changes.
